columns.name: Incident Owner - Owner Last Update Time

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = coalesce(todatetime(['Date Modified']), todatetime(['Date Created']), now()) | extend DateCreated = todatetime(['Date Created']), DateModified = todatetime(['Date Modified']), IncidentNumber = tostring(['IR Number']), IncidentType = tostring(['IR Type']), IncidentTitle = tostring(['Title']), IncidentStatus = tostring(['Status']), IncidentSeverity = tostring(['Severity']), IncidentStage = tostring(['Stage']), IncidentPriority = tostring(['Priority']), IncidentDisposition = tostring(['Disposition']), IncidentTags = tostring(['Tags']), IncidentOwner = tostring(['Owner']), IncidentCreator = tostring(['Creator']), IncidentTimezone = tostring(['Timezone']), IncidentPlaybook = tostring(['Playbook']), IncidentDescription = tostring(['Description']), IncidentConclusion = tostring(['Conclusion']), InvestigationTeam = tostring(['Investigation Team']), LinkedIncidents = todynamic(['Linked Incidents']), IncidentRawData = todynamic(['Incident Raw Data']), EventRawData = todynamic(['Event Raw Data']), IncidentOwnerLastUpdateTime = tostring(['Incident Owner - Owner Last Update Time']), IncidentOwnerTimeSpend = tostring(['Incident Owner - Time Spend']), CustomerName = tostring(['Customer - Name']), CustomerCountry = tostring(['Customer - Country']), RawRecord = pack_all() | project TimeGenerated, DateCreated, DateModified, IncidentNumber, IncidentType, IncidentTitle, IncidentStatus, IncidentSeverity, IncidentStage, IncidentPriority, IncidentDisposition, IncidentTags, IncidentOwner, IncidentCreator, IncidentTimezone, IncidentPlaybook, IncidentDescription, IncidentConclusion, InvestigationTeam, LinkedIncidents, IncidentRawData, EventRawData, IncidentOwnerLastUpdateTime, IncidentOwnerTimeSpend, CustomerName, CustomerCountry, RawRecord
